title: RePP
description: Fun small modpack for building server for friends.
body:
Lightweight modpack mainly based on create originally made for server with friends. It also has some optimization, customization and QoL mods.

Features

In game chat

Modpack contains in game chat to make communication easier for people who doesn't share discord server. Sound physics mod also makes this way of communication easier.

Trains and rotating creations

Thanks to create mod this modpack offers beautiful train tracks, immersive looking trains and some automation for people who like it. Now high bases are possible thanks to elevators ;)

Skin customization and decorations

Modpack also conatains ears mod which allows for more skin customization. Cosmetic armor allows to show nice looking armor while having functional one underneath. There are nice new fancy blocks too.

Food

New crops and foods will allow you to make more immersive gatherings with friends. Now your party can have fantastic colorful snacks and drinks.

Enchant system

Enchancment overhauls enchantments system so you can get new interesting experience. This one will show itself mainly in PvP. Fighting arenas will get some breath of freshness.

Structures

This modpack also contains new interesting view on structures present in game. Dungeons offer new views for long time players.
